data.title: Quectel Scales Local Antenna Production in India to Enhance IoT Supply Chain and Delivery
data.description: In Delhi, India, Quectel Wireless Solutions, a global IoT solutions provider, has revealed an extended partnership with Syrma SGS Technology Ltd, a major EMS provider, to produce IoT antennas in India. This move enhances Quectel's manufacturing abilities in the region and builds upon their current collaboration in producing IoT modules locally. The expanded partnership highlights Quectel's dedication to enhancing their presence in the market.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Starcloud Raises $170M Series A at $1.1bn Valuation Led by Benchmark and EQT Ventures
data.description: A company based in Redmond, Washington has announced that Starcloud has successfully raised $170 million in a Series A funding round at a valuation of $1.1 billion. This funding round was led by Benchmark and EQT Ventures. Starcloud has achieved the status of being the fastest unicorn ever produced by Y Combinator, achieving this milestone just 17 months after completing the seed accelerator program. The startup, which focuses on space infrastructure, is working on developing orbital data centers aimed at addressing terrestrial data storage challenges.

data.title: Larx Expands Global Footprint with Launch of LARX AI LTD., Appoints Rory Horgan as Director UK & EMEA
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Larx, Inc. announced the establishment of a new subsidiary in the UK to enhance its global reach and expedite the deployment of decision intelligence tools. This subsidiary will bolster operations in the UK, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. The platform aims to leverage artificial intelligence for improved decision-making processes. This move signifies a strategic step towards expanding their market presence and ensuring efficient delivery of services in these regions.

data.title: "All Access with Andy Garcia" Features Guadalupe Centers Inc. in Upcoming Public Television Segment on Social Infrastructure
data.description: A longstanding educational program in the Kansas City metro area, with a history spanning over 100 years, has been recognized for its culturally embedded social services and high academic standards. LOS ANGELES, April 2, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The acclaimed show "All Access with Andy Garcia" will showcase the significant influence of Guadalupe in the region, highlighting its contributions to the community.
Iran: Air defenses intercept hostile targets in the eastern city of Mashhad
Air defense units in Iran’s Mashhad reportedly intercept hostile targets, according to local reports.

data.title: Ex-FTX engineering head fined $3.7M in CFTC lawsuit for role in company’s collapse. Received no jail time for assisting authorities.
data.description: After the collapse of FTX in November 2022, Singh found himself in legal trouble as the SEC, CFTC, and US Department of Justice took action against him. However, Singh managed to avoid a lengthy prison sentence by cooperating with authorities.

data.title: Alabama recently recognized DAOs legal status under DUNA, becoming 2nd US state to do so. Legislation aims to support innovation and empower internet-native communities to compete with big tech. Miles Jennings, a16z, commented on the significance of this move.
data.description: According to a statement by Miles Jennings from a16z, the new legislation aims to foster innovation, ensure the safety of participants, and enable internet-native communities to rival big tech giants.

data.title: Deposits/withdrawals halted by Drift Protocol amidst a suspected $200M attack on exchange, possibly due to private key leak.
data.description: According to a threat researcher, a decentralized crypto exchange was possibly compromised in a $200 million exploit following a leak of a crypto wallet's private key.
